meta.intent: Create the band's first comparison between an obvious dock-costly rescue and a frozen route with better future value.
meta.expectedPath: Invest in the iced route to the center puppy first, rescue it cleanly, then pivot to the lower visible puppy with dock under control.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player chases the lower visible path first, spends dock space on route tax, and loses tempo before opening the frozen route.
meta.whatItProves: Ice can create a fair future-value choice against an immediately visible rescue path.
meta.notes: Role: choice. The lower puppy is tempting and visible; the iced center route is deliberately cleaner once opened.
